articles.title: Bright lights and hot orbs: UFO files shed light on sightings but leave interpretation to the public
articles.summary: President Donald Trump announced that the Pentagon is preparing to release previously unseen UFO files, saying the first documents will be released “very soon” after a February directive for transparency on extraterrestrial life and UAPs. The release follows a 2024 report by the All‑domain Anomaly Resolution Office that catalogued hundreds of UAP incidents but found no evidence of alien technology, and a second report on more recent sightings is expected soon.

en.title: Bright lights and hot orbs: UFO files shed light on sightings but leave interpretation to the public
en.summary: President Donald Trump announced that the Pentagon is preparing to release previously unseen UFO files, saying the first documents will be released “very soon” after a February directive for transparency on extraterrestrial life and UAPs. The release follows a 2024 report by the All‑domain Anomaly Resolution Office that catalogued hundreds of UAP incidents but found no evidence of alien technology, and a second report on more recent sightings is expected soon.

de.title: Helle Lichter und heiße Kugeln: UFO-Akten geben Aufschluss über Sichtungen, überlassen die Interpretation jedoch der Öffentlichkeit
de.summary: Präsident Donald Trump gab bekannt, dass das Pentagon die Veröffentlichung bisher unveröffentlichter UFO-Dateien vorbereitet und sagte, die ersten Dokumente würden „sehr bald“ veröffentlicht, nachdem im Februar eine Richtlinie für Transparenz über außerirdisches Leben und UAPs erlassen worden sei. Die Veröffentlichung folgt auf einen Bericht des All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office aus dem Jahr 2024, in dem Hunderte von UAP-Vorfällen katalogisiert, aber keine Hinweise auf außerirdische Technologie gefunden wurden. Ein zweiter Bericht über neuere Sichtungen wird in Kürze erwartet.

articles.title: UFO files | In pursuit of pies in the sky
articles.summary: S. Department of War released a first batch of 161 declassified UFO/UAP files, some dating back to the 1940s, on its website. President Donald Trump announced the release on X, calling it a move toward “complete and maximum transparency” about alien and extraterrestrial phenomena.

en.title: UFO files | In pursuit of pies in the sky
en.summary: S. Department of War released a first batch of 161 declassified UFO/UAP files, some dating back to the 1940s, on its website. President Donald Trump announced the release on X, calling it a move toward “complete and maximum transparency” about alien and extraterrestrial phenomena.

de.title: UFO-Dateien | Auf der Suche nach Kuchen im Himmel
de.summary: Das US-Kriegsministerium hat auf seiner Website einen ersten Stapel von 161 freigegebenen UFO/UAP-Dateien veröffentlicht, von denen einige aus den 1940er Jahren stammen. Präsident Donald Trump kündigte die Veröffentlichung auf X an und nannte sie einen Schritt hin zu „vollständiger und maximaler Transparenz“ über außerirdische und außerirdische Phänomene.

articles.title: Illusionist Uri Geller Reacts To US Congressman's Warning Over Next Set Of UFO Files: 'Holy Crap Is Coming'
articles.summary: Israeli‑British illusionist Uri Geller said he believes every word of US Congressman Tim Burchett’s warning that the next batch of declassified UFO files will dwarf the 162 documents already released. Burchett, a member of the UAP Caucus, told Joe Rogan that the first cache was “a drop in the bucket” and that “Holy Crap is coming,” citing pilots pulled from duty, psychological evaluations, and reports of underwater craft moving over 200 mph and as large as a football field.

en.title: Illusionist Uri Geller Reacts To US Congressman's Warning Over Next Set Of UFO Files: 'Holy Crap Is Coming'
en.summary: Israeli‑British illusionist Uri Geller said he believes every word of US Congressman Tim Burchett’s warning that the next batch of declassified UFO files will dwarf the 162 documents already released. Burchett, a member of the UAP Caucus, told Joe Rogan that the first cache was “a drop in the bucket” and that “Holy Crap is coming,” citing pilots pulled from duty, psychological evaluations, and reports of underwater craft moving over 200 mph and as large as a football field.

de.title: Der Illusionist Uri Geller reagiert auf die Warnung des US-Kongressabgeordneten vor der nächsten Reihe von UFO-Dateien: „Heiliger Mist kommt“
de.summary: Der israelisch-britische Illusionist Uri Geller sagte, er glaube jedes Wort der Warnung des US-Kongressabgeordneten Tim Burchett, dass die nächste Ladung freigegebener UFO-Dateien die 162 bereits veröffentlichten Dokumente in den Schatten stellen werde. Burchett, ein Mitglied des UAP Caucus, sagte Joe Rogan, dass der erste Cache „ein Tropfen auf den heißen Stein“ sei und dass „Heilige Scheiße kommt“, und verwies auf aus dem Dienst entlassene Piloten, psychologische Untersuchungen und Berichte über Unterwasserfahrzeuge, die sich mit mehr als 200 Meilen pro Stunde bewegten und so groß wie ein Fußballfeld waren.

articles.title: How to watch 'Sleeping Dog' - screen UAP/UFO doc online from anywhere
articles.summary: Sleeping Dog, a documentary directed by Michael Lazovsky, follows journalist and filmmaker Jeremy Corbell as he investigates UFO and UAP phenomena. The film draws on Corbell's personal archive of hundreds of hours of footage, including material from well‑known UFO figures such as George Knapp, John Lear and Bob Lazar. Lazovsky says the documentary serves as insurance for Corbell, who faces threats from rogue organizations and companies that allegedly try to silence him.

en.summary: Sleeping Dog, a documentary directed by Michael Lazovsky, follows journalist and filmmaker Jeremy Corbell as he investigates UFO and UAP phenomena. de.title: So können Sie „Sleeping Dog“ – UAP/UFO-Dokumentation von überall aus online ansehen
de.summary: „Sleeping Dog“, ein Dokumentarfilm von Michael Lazovsky, begleitet den Journalisten und Filmemacher Jeremy Corbell bei seiner Untersuchung von UFO- und UAP-Phänomenen. Der Film stützt sich auf Corbells persönliches Archiv mit Hunderten von Stunden Filmmaterial, darunter Material von bekannten UFO-Persönlichkeiten wie George Knapp, John Lear und Bob Lazar. Laut Lazovsky dient der Dokumentarfilm als Versicherung für Corbell, der Drohungen von Schurkenorganisationen und Unternehmen ausgesetzt ist, die angeblich versuchen, ihn zum Schweigen zu bringen.

summaries.sighting-bright-lights-and-hot-orbs-ufo-: President Donald Trump announced that the Pentagon is preparing to release previously unseen UFO files, saying the first documents will be released “very soon” after a February directive for transparency on extraterrestrial life and UAPs. The release follows a 2024 report by the All‑domain Anomaly Resolution Office that catalogued hundreds of UAP incidents but found no evidence of alien technology, and a second report on more recent sightings is expected soon. Former director Sean Kirkpatrick has warned that the documents are unlikely to contain bombshell revelations or photos of aliens, noting that many viral videos can be explained by mundane military equipment. Congressional Republicans, led by Representative Anna Paulina Luna, have demanded UAP videos from the Pentagon and criticize the agency for not providing them, while the Task Force on Declassification of Federal Secrets continues to investigate UAP encounters. Trump’s statements have sparked both enthusiasm and skepticism, with the Pentagon yet to confirm the release schedule or the content of the forthcoming files.
summaries.ufo-files-in-pursuit-of-pies-in-the-sky: The U.S. Department of War released a first batch of 161 declassified UFO/UAP files, some dating back to the 1940s, on its website. President Donald Trump announced the release on X, calling it a move toward “complete and maximum transparency” about alien and extraterrestrial phenomena. The files contain reports from the FBI, State Department, NASA, and Pentagon, including images of flying discs, a football‑shaped UAP near Japan, a 2026 U.S. Army sighting, and a glowing orange orb likened to the Eye of Sauron. A March 2024 Pentagon report noted that no evidence proved UAP were alien technology, with many sightings later identified as weather balloons, spy planes, satellites or other normal activity.
summaries.illusionist-uri-geller-reacts-to-us-cong: Israeli‑British illusionist Uri Geller said he believes every word of US Congressman Tim Burchett’s warning that the next batch of declassified UFO files will dwarf the 162 documents already released. Burchett, a member of the UAP Caucus, told Joe Rogan that the first cache was “a drop in the bucket” and that “Holy Crap is coming,” citing pilots pulled from duty, psychological evaluations, and reports of underwater craft moving over 200 mph and as large as a football field. Geller, who claims his paranormal abilities are real, tweeted that in the 1970s Wernher von Braun showed him metal fragments from a crashed UFO and that he was taken to a refrigerated underground facility at NASA’s Goddard Space Center where he saw non‑human bodies behind frosted glass. He says the released Apollo and Gemini mission reports of strange lights and hovering objects near spacecraft confirm his long‑held claims and hopes the forthcoming files will expose NASA’s full involvement. The Department of War released the 162 documents on May 8, 2026 under President Trump’s February 19 directive, with the next set expected soon.
summaries.film-how-to-watch-sleeping-dog-screen-ua: Sleeping Dog, a documentary directed by Michael Lazovsky, follows journalist and filmmaker Jeremy Corbell as he investigates UFO and UAP phenomena. The film draws on Corbell's personal archive of hundreds of hours of footage, including material from well‑known UFO figures such as George Knapp, John Lear and Bob Lazar. Lazovsky says the documentary serves as insurance for Corbell, who faces threats from rogue organizations and companies that allegedly try to silence him. Corbell has about 46 videos that have not yet been released to the public, and he hopes the White House and Congress will declassify more UFO footage. The film aims to humanize the subject, dispel conspiracy stereotypes, and encourage serious discussion, and it became available digitally on May 12.
